title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.1265 - Fire, safety, health, and sanitation inspections, facility to comply
text:
210.1265.  Fire, safety, health, and sanitation inspections, facility to comply. — The residential care facility shall comply with all fire, safety, health, and sanitation inspections as may be required by state law or local ordinance.
(L. 2021 H.B. 557 & 560) 
Effective 7-14-21
